details: The agent failed to report that the repository openclaw/this-does-not-exist does not exist. Instead, the agent encountered a transport-layer error (SSE vs JSON parsing issue with the MCP endpoint) and reported on that technical failure without ever reaching the GitHub API to check the repository. The task required reporting that the repository doesn't exist, but the agent never got that far and instead described an unrelated infrastructure problem with the MCP server response format.
